title: Aberdeen Cold Snap
lead: Aberdeen is experiencing a severe cold snap with a Z-Score of -3.57. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Aberdeen are extreme, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a high Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 13.5 GG, indicating a substantial need for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 67%, and the wind speed is moderate at 12.2 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical cold snap.
